scripts.build:localhost: node scripts/increment-build.mjs && node scripts/embed-fonts.mjs && vite build --mode localhost && node scripts/finalize-dist-html.mjs localhost
scripts.build:singlefile: node scripts/increment-build.mjs && node scripts/embed-fonts.mjs && vite build --mode singlefile && node scripts/finalize-dist-html.mjs singlefile
scripts.deploy: npm run build:localhost && npm run serve
scripts.deploy:singlefile: npm run build:singlefile && npm run serve
scripts.commit-build: npm run build:singlefile && git add -A && node scripts/do-commit.mjs "$npm_config_message"
scripts.build-serve: npm run build:localhost && npm run serve
